input.subject: [All Company] February All-Hands Meeting
input.snippet: Hi everyone! Please join us for our monthly all-hands...
input.body_text:
Hi everyone!

Please join us for our monthly All-Hands meeting. We have some exciting updates to share!

WHEN: Friday, February 27, 2026
TIME: 4:00 PM - 5:00 PM PST
WHERE: Main Auditorium + Zoom for remote team

Zoom Link: https://zoom.us/j/allhands2026
Meeting ID: 111 222 3333

AGENDA:
- Company performance update
- Q2 roadmap preview
- New hire introductions
- AMA with leadership team
- Surprise announcement! 🎉

Snacks and drinks will be provided for in-office attendees.

This meeting is mandatory for all employees. If you absolutely cannot attend, please let your manager know.

See you there!

Michelle

--
Michelle Park
CEO, StartupCo

events.title: Company All-Hands Meeting
events.description: Monthly all-hands meeting with company updates and AMA
